name: Myelin-Conversion
description: **Codebase Intelligence:** This MATLAB codebase contains 1 extracted functions across 1 files. Key extracted functionality includes: trfm2processDet.
repo_insight: The Myelin-Conversion repository provides specialized biomedical image and signal processing capabilities in MATLAB, specifically focused on the neuroimaging and histological domain of myelin quantification, mapping, and structural analysis. At its core, this project is designed to automate the conversion of raw myelin structural metrics—such as those derived from magnetic resonance imaging, electron microscopy, or histology—into processed detection datasets ready for downstream segmentation or spatial statistical analysis. To use this repository, a researcher or developer imports the codebase into a MATLAB environment and executes the trfm2processDet function, passing in source myelin data alongside specific spatial transformation matrices or conversion parameters to yield a standardized detection output. Structurally and algorithmically, the repository relies on this singular, optimized function to perform complex matrix transformations, coordinate mapping, and thresholding steps that ensure high fidelity and spatial accuracy when translating anatomical myelin characteristics into actionable, processed signals. This streamlined design minimizes computational overhead, making it an efficient tool for integration into larger, automated neuroimaging pipelines that analyze myelin sheath thickness, g-ratio calculations, or white matter integrity.
